problem_statement:
Title: W1 2025 - Bug Bash IV [Sustainability] Value Chain Tracking Enablement
Repro Steps:
Open the Sustainability Setup page Keep all fields in the Procurement FastTab disabled Enable the 'Enable Value Chain Tracking' field ===RESULT=== Only the 'Enable Value Chain Tracking' field has been enabled ===EXTECTED RESULT=== Enabling this field, it will also enable the following fields if they are not previously enabled: Use Emissions in Purchase Documents Item Emissions Resource Emissions Work/Machine Center Emissions
Description:
This is small improvement. You cannot use Value Chain tracking enabled if you didn't previously enable the following options: Use Emissions in Purchase Documents Item Emissions Resource Emissions Work/Machine Center Emissions So, just enable them when you enable the Enable Value Chain Tracking field if these fields are not previously already enabled.

Title: [Shopify] Suggest payments matches non-success (pending, failed...) transactions

Description:

Title: Shopify - Can not export customer C00010 DD. The length of the string is 22, but it must be less than or equal to 10 characters. Value: Capital Region Zealand, field: State
Repro Steps:
Navigate to countries, find DK and select format address to Zip+City+County. Create new customer. Name DDD, email dd@contoso.com. Country = DK, Country = Capital Region Zealand (something longer than 22 chars). Connect BC to Shopify Navigate to Customers (and companies) and try to Add Customer to Shopify. - Select created customer. Result- error: Error message: Can not export customer C00010 DD. The length of the string is 22, but it must be less than or equal to 10 characters. Value: Capital Region Zealand, field: StateAL call stack: "Shpfy Customer Export"(CodeUnit 30116).FillInShopifyCustomerData line 54 - Shopify Connector by Microsoft version 26.1.33404.34999"Shpfy Customer Export"(CodeUnit 30116).CreateShopifyCustomer line 12 - Shopify Connector by Microsoft version 26.1.33404.34999"Shpfy Customer Export"(CodeUnit 30116).OnRun(Trigger) line 15 - Shopify Connector by Microsoft version 26.1.33404.34999"Shpfy Add Customer to Shopify"(Report 30112)."Customer - OnAfterGetRecord"(Trigger) line 10 - Shopify Connector by Microsoft version 26.1.33404.34999 This is old design - we tried to send country if present. But now we know for sure which Country requires or supports PRovince/County in Shopify. So we can enhance that error handling and DO NOT send county/province info with addresses where this information is not required. Notice that we do not send it to Shopify even if it is less then 10 chars: {"query":"mutation {customerCreate(input: {email: "dd@contoso.com ", addresses: {company: "DD ", zip: "DK-2100 ", city: "Copenhagen ", countryCode: DK}}) {customer {id, addresses {id, country, province}}, userErrors {field, message}}}"}
Description:
